description_long: This is an old, weathered wooden boat with a partially enclosed cabin and an open deck area. The hull shows significant signs of age, with faded and peeling paint, and some visible structural damage near the stern. The cabin structure is simple, with a small roof and a hatch or door opening, and the deck is cluttered with wooden planks and debris. The bow is pointed and the hull is V-shaped, typical of small fishing or utility boats. There are no visible propulsion mechanisms such as motors or oars, and the boat appears to be abandoned or out of service. The overall appearance suggests it has been exposed to the elements for a long time, giving it a rustic, derelict character.
description: A weathered, abandoned wooden boat with a small cabin and open deck, showing signs of age and damage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the boat, the cabin structure, and visible hull damage at the stern.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, V-shaped hull, and the cabin roof with a hatch.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the open deck, cabin, and more hull damage at the stern.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stern, open cabin entry, and interior deck details.
